string.text: Waterproof stalker backpack made of rubberized fabric. Allows to store a lot of things.
Box with tools. Intended for repairing weapons.
Box with tools. Intended for repairing armoured suits.
Waterproof sleeping bag. Treated with a special composition that frightens off mutants.

The device which stabilizes the electrical activity of the brain. The protection system against telepathic radiations is improved in the last version of BRAIN-8. Operates directly from a backpack.\n%c[255,238,153,26]• %c[default]Does not allow the mental health drops below 90%

Special stalker player, with a support for custom music, designed especially for the Zone. Powered by a built-in "Battery" artifact particle. Has not purchased the popularity among stalkers, but if there is no guitar, it may come in handy.
Special USB storage device. Designed to play sounds or music.
Allows to set the time during which you can do something.

Advanced detector-scanner of the new generation. Detects artifacts in a distance up to 50 meters, and displays their location on the PDA. Detects the static zones of anomalous activity, which are available in the database, while retaining the ability of artifact detection. Locations of anomalous zones and artifacts are displayed on a special screen. The search artifact software has been improved; theoretically it can detect not yet known to science anomalous formations.
Used box of tools. Intended for repairing weapons. However, there is a lack of spare parts for the full repair. This repair kit can repair using only spare parts from a donor weapon.
Used box of tools. Intended for repairing armoured suits. However, there is a lack of spare parts for the full repair. This repair kit can repair using only spare parts from a donor armoured suit.
A box of tools designed to work with grenade fillings. The set includes a coil of specially durable wire and pliers.
"Iskra-226" is a laptop of the new generation. Includes personal information.
The most mystical, and unexplored artifact-device. The main value lies in its ability of movement, by which you can easily teleport anywhere.
The ultimate version of GPS-conductor. Developed by unknown scientists in a secret lab.
Includes utilities for hacking all types of PDAs. To install the tools, run the software.
The RS-15 explosive charge with the detonator
Explosive charge. Comes with a remote control. Use to deploy.
Use it to detonate the RS-15 charges.
Detects booby traps. Weighs 2.25 kg. Effective detection range - 50 meters. Operates directly from the backpack.
Detects booby traps. The upgraded version. Weighs 1.12 kg. Effective detection range - 145 meters. Operates directly from the backpack.
Use it, to convert it into the cash.

Improved new generation scanning detector. Allows you to detect the artifacts at a distance of up to 100 meters, and immediately transmit their location to your PDA. Includes software for anomaly detection, storing it in a database, while concurrently scanning for artifacts. Location of the anomalous zones and artifacts on the detector are displayed on a special display. This detector uses such advanced technology, that, theoretically, it might even be able to detect still unknown anomalies and artifacts.
It registers the presence of ionizing particles in the air. LED indicator informs on the radiation intensity. Operates directly from the backpack.
Used to set the labels on the map.
Source of electricity for self-contained power detectors. Operating voltage: 1.5V. \nRunning time: 60 seconds.
Source of electricity for self-contained power detectors. Operating voltage: 1.5V. \nRunning time: 90 seconds.
Source of electricity for self-contained power detectors. Operating voltage: 1.5V. \nRunning time: 120 seconds.
An often useful non-egg laying chicken.
